top_signals.title: Vanguard Favors Treasuries as 10-Year Yields Near Range Top
top_signals.summary: Vanguard Group Inc., one of the world’s largest money managers, is sticking with its bet on US Treasuries, saying yields in the $31 trillion market are near the top of its expected range for 10-year notes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
